entity.summary: Artela-native automated market maker preserved in current exchange registries with historical fees and volume but no current TVL or recent fee activity.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves ArtexSwap as an Artela-native AMM and retains cumulative exchange history. Current TVL, 24-hour fees, 7-day fees, and 30-day fees are zero. No verified shutdown announcement was recovered, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.

evidence.title: ArtexSwap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies ArtexSwap as the native Artela AMM.

evidence.title: ArtexSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the ArtexSwap identity and Artela chain association.

evidence.title: ArtexSwap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Historical cumulative fees and volume remain, but current TVL and recent fee windows are zero, supporting a limited classification.
